title: Target
description: Where an approved promotion-record ships. v0 supports file:// and repo:// URI schemes.

oneOf.title: FileTarget
oneOf.description: A writable path on the local filesystem. Format: file:///absolute/path or file://./relative/path.

oneOf.title: RepoTarget
oneOf.description: A path inside a named repo. Format: repo://<repo-name>/<path/inside/repo>.
